data.task_objective: Create Email Template Generator for recruiter communications, producing interview invitations and follow-up emails.
data.context: No completed previous tasks context available.
data.result:
```python
def generate_email_template(template_type, candidate_name, job_title, interview_date=None, interview_time=None, interviewer_name=None, interview_link=None, feedback_link=None, recruiter_name=None):
    """
    Generates email templates for recruiter communications, including interview invitations and follow-up emails.

    Args:
        template_type (str):  The type of email template to generate.
                                Valid options: "interview_invitation", "interview_followup", "feedback_request", "rejection", "offer"
        candidate_name (str): The name of the candidate.
        job_title (str): The title of the job the candidate is interviewing for.
        interview_date (str, optional): The date of the interview (YYYY-MM-DD). Required for "interview_invitation" and "interview_followup".
        interview_time (str, optional): The time of the interview (HH:MM AM/PM). Required for "interview_invitation" and "interview_followup".
        interviewer_name (str, optional): The name of the interviewer. Required for "interview_invitation" and "interview_followup".
        interview_link (str, optional): The link to the online interview. Required for "interview_invitation".
        feedback_link (str, optional): Link for interviewer to submit feedback. Required for "feedback_request".
        recruiter_name (str, optional): The name of the recruiter. Required for "rejection", "offer".

    Returns:
        str: The generated email template.
    """

    if template_type == "interview_invitation":
        subject = f"Interview Invitation: {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for your interest in the {job_title} position at [Company Name].

We are pleased to invite you to an interview with {interviewer_name} to discuss your qualifications further.

The interview is scheduled for {interview_date} at {interview_time}. Please use the following link to join the meeting: {interview_link}

Please come prepared to discuss your resume and your experience in relation to the requirements of this role.

We look forward to speaking with you!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
"""
    elif template_type == "interview_followup":
        subject = f"Following Up: Interview for {job_title}"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

I hope this email finds you well.

I'm writing to follow up on your interview for the {job_title} position on {interview_date} at {interview_time} with {interviewer_name}.

We appreciate you taking the time to interview with us. We are currently reviewing all candidates and will be in touch soon with an update on your application.

In the meantime, please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Thank you again for your interest in [Company Name].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
"""

    elif template_type == "feedback_request":
        subject = f"Feedback Request: {candidate_name} - {job_title} Interview"
        body = f"""
Dear {interviewer_name},

Please provide your feedback on the interview with {candidate_name} for the {job_title} position.

You can submit your feedback using the following link: {feedback_link}

Your feedback is valuable in helping us make informed hiring decisions.  Please submit it within [Number] days.

Thank you,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
"""

    elif template_type == "rejection":
        subject = f"Update on Your Application for {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for your interest in the {job_title} position at [Company Name] and for taking the time to interview with us.

We have carefully reviewed your application and qualifications. While your experience is impressive, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose qualifications and experience more closely align with the specific requirements of this role.

This was a difficult decision, and we want to thank you again for your time and effort. We wish you the best of luck in your job search.

Sincerely,

{recruiter_name}
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
"""
    elif template_type == "offer":
        subject = f"Job Offer: {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

We are pleased to offer you the position of {job_title} at [Company Name]!

We were very impressed with your skills and experience during the interview process, and we believe you would be a valuable asset to our team.

Please find attached a formal offer letter outlining the details of the position, including compensation, benefits, and start date.

We would appreciate it if you could review the offer letter carefully and let us know if you have any questions. Please return the signed offer letter by [Date].

We are excited about the possibility of you joining our team!

Sincerely,

{recruiter_name}
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
"""
    else:
        return "Invalid template type."

    return f"""Subject: {subject}

{body}"""

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example usage:
    interview_invitation_email = generate_email_template(
        template_type="interview_invitation",
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        interview_date="2024-03-15",
        interview_time="10:00 AM",
        interviewer_name="Jane Smith",
        interview_link="https://example.com/interview"
    )
    print("Interview Invitation Email:\n", interview_invitation_email)

    interview_followup_email = generate_email_template(
        template_type="interview_followup",
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        interview_date="2024-03-15",
        interview_time="10:00 AM",
        interviewer_name="Jane Smith",
    )
    print("\nInterview Follow-up Email:\n", interview_followup_email)

    feedback_request_email = generate_email_template(
        template_type="feedback_request",
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        interviewer_name="Jane Smith",
        feedback_link="https://example.com/feedback"
    )
    print("\nFeedback Request Email:\n", feedback_request_email)

    rejection_email = generate_email_template(
        template_type="rejection",
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        recruiter_name="Alice Johnson"
    )
    print("\nRejection Email:\n", rejection_email)

    offer_email = generate_email_template(
        template_type="offer",
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Software Engineer",
        recruiter_name="Alice Johnson"
    )
    print("\nOffer Email:\n", offer_email)
```
